moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Kicks Into Gear
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are deep into their pre-season schedules this week, with Aston Villa playing Walsall today and many more friendlies lined up before the new season kicks off on August 21st.

angles.name: Pre-season action
angles.copy: Pre-season friendlies are in full swing! Aston Villa played Walsall today, who are you looking forward to seeing in action before the Premier League proper kicks off?

angles.name: Countdown to kick-off
angles.copy: Only a month until the Premier League season starts! What's your club's biggest challenge in pre-season?

moments.title: World Cup Anthems Storm the Charts
moments.blurb: Following England's semi-final exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, classic football anthems like Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' have re-entered the UK Top 10, alongside Shakira and Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai'.

angles.name: Football's enduring hits
angles.copy: Even after the World Cup, the anthems live on! Oasis and Three Lions back in the Top 10. Which World Cup song is still stuck in your head?

angles.name: Chart comeback
angles.copy: Football fever hits the charts! 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 10. Proof that some songs just never die!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off This Week
moments.blurb: One of the UK's biggest summer events, Latitude Festival, kicks off this Thursday, July 23rd, at Henham Park in Suffolk, promising four days of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just two days away! Who's heading to Henham Park for a weekend of brilliant music and comedy?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival starts Thursday, bringing incredible acts and a vibrant atmosphere to Henham Park.

moments.title: Big Love Festival Celebrates 10 Years in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival is currently underway in South Wales, celebrating its 10th anniversary with over 140 bands and DJs in a family-friendly setting.

angles.name: Wales's big weekend
angles.copy: Happy 10th birthday, Big Love Festival! Who's enjoying the incredible music and atmosphere in South Wales this weekend?

angles.name: Family festival fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is bringing the good vibes to South Wales! 140+ acts and fun for all ages. What's your favourite festival memory?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' has officially become the longest-running UK Number 1 single by a British act.

angles.name: Chart record breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the longest-running British #1 single. Have you streamed it today?

angles.name: British talent shines
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean on their chart-topping success with 'Rein Me In'! What a track!

moments.title: Mixed Summer Weather & Drought Concerns
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing mixed summer weather this week, with dry spells and above-average temperatures expected, particularly in the South East, but also ongoing concerns about drought conditions and water usage in several regions.

angles.name: Summer forecast
angles.copy: Sunshine and showers on the cards for the UK this week! Don't forget the sun cream AND the umbrella. How's the weather where you are?

angles.name: Water worries
angles.copy: With dry spells continuing, drought concerns are high in some areas. Remember to be water-wise this summer!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday to Cat Stevens!
moments.blurb: Legendary British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday today.

angles.name: Folk icon's big day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens! What's your favourite song from this folk legend?

angles.name: Timeless tunes
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World', Cat Stevens' music is timeless. Happy Birthday to a true icon!

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday, Paloma Faith!
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actress Paloma Faith celebrates her 41st birthday today.

angles.name: Pop star's birthday
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the fabulous Paloma Faith, who turns 41 today! What's your favourite Paloma track?

angles.name: Celebrating Paloma
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the unique and talented Paloma Faith! Here's to more incredible music!

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday to Damian Marley!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Jamaican reggae artist Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, son of Bob Marley, turns 48 today.

angles.name: Reggae royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the one and only Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley! What's your favourite of his tracks?

angles.name: Celebrating Jr. Gong
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to reggae icon Damian Marley! Keep the good vibes coming!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79 Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Don Henley, the iconic drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Eagles legend's birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Don Henley of the Eagles turns 79! Get ready to celebrate a true rock legend. What's your favourite Eagles song?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Eve
angles.copy: Wishing Don Henley a very happy birthday for tomorrow! Which of his solo hits or Eagles classics do you love most?

moments.title: Slash Celebrates 61st Birthday on Thursday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar legend Slash, known for his iconic riffs, will celebrate his 61st birthday this Thursday.

angles.name: Rock icon's birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! Slash turns 61 on Thursday. What's your favourite Guns N' Roses guitar solo?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses legend
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday! His guitar work is iconic.

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83 on Monday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday this coming Monday.

angles.name: Rock royalty birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Monday?! Still rocking! What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless icon
angles.copy: Happy birthday for Monday to the incredible Mick Jagger! The man is an absolute legend.
